text.title: Agent Failure Taxonomy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply agent-failure-taxonomy. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Sample ≥10 recent incidents.
step.description: Input: postmortems + trace store. Action: Read.. Output: incident sample.
step.note: Step 1. Required input: postmortems + trace store.

step.name: Apply r5 default labels; flag any that fit no label.
step.description: Input: sample. Action: Label.. Output: labelled sample.

step.name: For any unfit case, propose new label under r2; require ≥3 instances + owner.
step.description: Input: unfit cases. Action: Propose + vote.. Output: new labels (if any).

step.name: Map each label to a remediation lane (r4).
step.description: Input: labels. Action: Author lane mapping.. Output: label→lane table.

step.name: Commit `evals/taxonomy.md` v1.0; wire postmortem template to use labels.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Author + commit.. Output: versioned taxonomy.
